docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY JONES-TORRES, DOMINIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT JARQUIN, ANGELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JARQUIN, ANGELA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY JARQUIN, ANGELA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JONES-TORRES, DOMINIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED SERVED MAY-22-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JONES-TORRES, DOMINIQUE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES-TORRES, DOMINIQUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JARQUIN, ANGELA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JARQUIN, ANGELA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT JONES-TORRES, DOMINIQUE $2,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
